props.ChoiceText: After the noise ended, you learned once again that war leaves useful things lying beside the dead.
props.ChoiceBio: Battlefield salvage taught you that survival keeps teaching ugly economies long after glory has gone elsewhere.

0.TransitionText: Because battlefield salvage taught you that war leaves useful things lying beside the dead, scavenged survival led naturally back toward mercenary service.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because battlefield salvage taught you that war leaves useful things lying beside the dead, the war only seasoned you further.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Veteran, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because battlefield salvage taught you that war leaves useful things lying beside the dead, survival after war still slipped toward hardship.
